# ParagonBoardDefinition.ClassSnoName property

The owning class's CoreTOC SnoName (e.g. `Warlock`) — a stable key matching [`SnoName`](../CharacterClass/SnoName.md); or Empty if decoded byte-only. See [`ClassSnoId`](./ClassSnoId.md) for the convention/boundary.

```csharp
public string ClassSnoName { get; }
```
